findings.detail: `app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts` uses `stripe.webhooks.constructEvent` on raw body with signature verification.
Protected APIs use `requireSession` / session checks; checkout returns 401 without session (confirmed in E2E).
`useSearchParams` in sign-in form wrapped in `<Suspense>` in `app/auth/signin/page.tsx`.
E2E asserts X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, CSP with object-src none on homepage.

recommendations: Run OWASP ZAP or dependency audit on a schedule (npm audit shows low/moderate upstream).
Re-verify Stripe webhook idempotency under load before high-traffic launch.
notes: Not a substitute for full dynamic penetration test; complements Phase 5 E2E.
